description_long: This is a vintage black pickup truck with a classic, rounded cab and a long, open cargo bed. The body features smooth, curved fenders and a prominent front grille with horizontal chrome accents. The truck has two doors, rounded headlights, and a simple, utilitarian design typical of early to mid-20th-century vehicles. The wheels are solid black with a basic, utilitarian rim design. The bed is wooden-floored, visible from the rear, and the overall finish is glossy, reflecting light. There are no visible license plates or manufacturer badges, and the truck exudes a retro, utilitarian charm.
description: A glossy black vintage pickup truck with a rounded cab, open wooden bed, and classic curved fenders. The design is simple and utilitarian, with solid black wheels and chrome front accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the truck, the rounded cab, and the open cargo bed.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wooden bed floor and the back of the cab.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of the first side, with the open bed and rounded fenders visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the curved hood, prominent grille, and rounded headlights.
attribute_wheel_design: Solid black wheels with a simple, utilitarian rim design and no visible spokes.
